changeSet.author: admin
admin
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, role VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'USER', is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, last_login_at TIMESTAMP NULL );
